name: Carne Gisada Con Papas (Meat #t Potatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into cubes and brown in shortening in a heavy skillet or Dutch oven.
2. Peel and cube the potatoes (approximately 1/2-inch cubes).
3. Once the meat is slightly browned, add the potatoes and continue to brown. Do not worry if it sticks to the bottom of the skillet.
4. Add tomato sauce, salt, pepper, cumin powder, and garlic.
5. Add approximately one cup of water.
6. Simmer until the meat and potatoes are tender. The potatoes will thicken the sauce.
